hero.title: Undercolor
hero.subtitle: The Visual Social Deduction Game
hero.description: Find the imposter among you. Everyone sees an image, but not everyone sees the same one. Describe, deduce, and vote out the intruder before it's too late!

visual.title: Visual Deduction
visual.description: Unlike word-based games, Undercolor uses images. Describe what you see without revealing too much—or too little.

realtime.title: Real-time Multiplayer
realtime.description: Play with 3 to 20 friends in real-time. Perfect for parties, game nights, or remote hangouts.

roles.title: Multiple Roles
roles.description: Innocents, Imposters, and the mysterious Mr. White. Each role brings unique challenges and strategies.

accessible.title: Play Anywhere
accessible.description: Browser-based and mobile-friendly. No downloads required—just share a room code and play!

step1.title: Create or Join
step1.description: Create a room and share the code with friends, or join an existing game with a code.

step2.title: Receive Your Image
step2.description: Everyone receives an image. Innocents see Image A, while Imposters see a subtly different Image B.

step3.title: Describe & Discuss
step3.description: Take turns describing your image. Be vague enough to avoid helping imposters, but clear enough to prove you're innocent!

step4.title: Vote & Eliminate
step4.description: Vote to eliminate who you think is the imposter. Innocents win by eliminating all imposters!

innocent.title: Innocent
innocent.description: You see Image A. Your goal is to identify and eliminate the imposters while proving your innocence through your descriptions.

imposter.title: Imposter
imposter.description: You see Image B—similar but different. Blend in by giving vague descriptions and deflect suspicion onto innocents.

mrWhite.title: Mr. White
mrWhite.description: You see nothing. Use social engineering to survive. If eliminated, guess the theme to win instantly!

cta.title: Ready to Find the Imposter?
cta.description: Create a room and invite your friends for an unforgettable game night!

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to track your stats and game history. You can also play as a guest!
auth.registerDescription: Create an account to save your stats, track your wins, and compete on leaderboards.

stats.title: My Stats
stats.rolePerformanceDescription: Your win rate for each role you've played

history.title: Game History
history.description: View all your past games and results
history.playFirst: Play your first game to see your history!
history.emptyDescription: Start playing to build your game history!

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: View your stats and game performance

login.title: Admin Login
login.description: Sign in with admin credentials to manage game content.

register.title: Admin Registration
register.description: Create an admin account to manage game content and image sets.

images.title: Image Sets
images.description: Manage image pairs for the game
